findings.title: Eight Sleep does a full email+password login on every run
findings.detail: Framework writeback persists the stale token before fetch_day; the 401-path re-login token is never persisted (save_secret has zero call sites). 18 password grants/day against an unofficial API is a lockout risk.

evidence.quote: authenticate only re-logins if token absent; 401 handler token never saved

verdict.reason: Verifier re-counted 126 relogins and 126 stale-token writebacks; writeback precedes fetch_day.

findings.verifier_note: Verifier re-counted 126 relogins and 126 stale-token writebacks; writeback precedes fetch_day.

findings.detail: role_policies grants GetSecretValue AND UpdateSecret by default; four lambdas share the ingestion-keys bundle, so each read-only-token consumer holds write access to four sources' credentials. Make UpdateSecret opt-in; consider splitting the internet-facing HAE bearer out.

verdict.reason: ADJUSTED: the bundling is a documented COST-B decision; narrowed to the default-UpdateSecret over-privilege.

findings.verifier_note: ADJUSTED: the bundling is a documented COST-B decision; narrowed to the default-UpdateSecret over-privilege.

findings.title: The entire journal enrichment layer's output no longer exists in the store - every consumer silently degrades
findings.detail: 0/50 journal items carry enriched_at or any of the 23 enrichment fields. notion_lambda.write_entries full-item put_item clobbers the enricher's update_item output on re-ingestion; the 2-day enrichment window never heals history (14 runs found 0 entries). ~20 consumer sites read None; journal<->wearable correlation is structurally impossible. Fix: full_sync+force backfill (cents) + enrichment-preserving writes + edit-aware re-enrichment.

verdict.reason: Verifier re-probed 0/50; structural data-loss confirmed regardless of whether the historical wipe was clobber or reset.
